meaning: adj.秋的,秋天的,已过中年的
examples: Pale colours are much more in vogue than autumnal bronzes and coppers.
This is where Milton gets the "autumnal."
But highs of 77 or 83 aren’t exactly autumnal to this Northern girl at heart.
Exuding a stately academic atmosphere, the college campuses are especially attractive when decked out in autumnal hues.
Not everybody agrees that the main autumnal role of anthocyanins is protection from excess illumination.
